questions.subject: Networking
questions.explanation: TCP establishes a connection before transferring data.

questions.subject: Python
questions.stem: Which keyword defines a function in Python?
questions.explanation: The def keyword starts a named function definition.

questions.subject: Database
questions.stem: Which SQL statement reads rows from a table?
questions.explanation: SELECT queries data from one or more tables.

questions.subject: Web
questions.explanation: HTTP is the HyperText Transfer Protocol used by the web.

questions.subject: AI
questions.stem: What is a prompt in an AI model interaction?
questions.explanation: A prompt is the input or instruction given to the model.
